tribe.title: Stage 3 · Tribe
tribe.subtitle: Gather your people, build shelter, and grow a culture.

diplomacy.label: Share our fire
diplomacy.description: Offer warmth and a meal. Old grudges soften over food.

diplomacy.label: Barter hides and flint
diplomacy.description: Swap what you have spare for what they have spare.

diplomacy.label: Spread ill word of them
diplomacy.description: Let the other camps hear of their cruelty. They will guess who talked.

diplomacy.label: Raise a palisade
diplomacy.description: Stakes and thorn against their next raid.

diplomacy.label: Drive them from the valley
diplomacy.description: Send your hunters. Weaken them first, and expect to lose people.

actions.label: Build huts
actions.description: Shelter lets more of your kind survive and settle.

actions.label: Organise foraging
actions.description: Coordinated foraging steadies the food supply.

actions.label: Learn toolmaking
actions.description: Better tools mean more materials from the land.

actions.label: Send scouts
actions.description: Push back the unknown — find resources and rivals before they find you.

actions.label: Gathering songs
actions.description: Shared songs are the first thread of culture.

actions.label: Seasonal rituals
actions.description: Rituals bind the tribe and deepen its identity.

actions.label: Raise a totem
actions.description: A great totem tells your story to every traveller.

actions.label: Host a community gathering
actions.description: Food, stories and shared work deepen the tribe’s identity.

actions.label: Build fish weirs
actions.description: Traps in the shallows feed the tribe through lean months.

actions.label: Paint the caves
actions.description: Ochre handprints and herds — your people telling their own story.

actions.label: Work the salt flats
actions.description: Salt preserves meat, and buys goodwill from every neighbour.

actions.label: Harvest the thicket
actions.description: Berries in season — sweet, and easy to carry home.

onboarding.title: Your first fire
onboarding.text: Your tribe gathers at the hearth. Resources grow on their own — spend them on decisions to grow faster and build a culture.

onboarding.title: The unknown
onboarding.text: The world beyond your firelight is dark. Send scouts to reveal resource sites and the rivals who share this land.

onboarding.title: You are not alone
onboarding.text: Rival tribes grow alongside you. Trade with the friendly, guard against the hostile — raiders will march on your camp.

events.title: A hard season
events.description: The rains fail and the foraging grounds wither.

choices.label: Ration carefully
choices.note: Rationed through the drought.

choices.label: Range further afield
choices.note: Ranged far — and lost one to the wild.

events.title: Wanderers arrive
events.description: A band of wanderers asks to join your fire.

choices.label: Welcome them
choices.note: Welcomed the wanderers.

choices.label: Send them on
choices.note: Kept to your own — traditions held firm.

events.title: A great herd passes
events.description: Thundering beasts cross the plain — a season of plenty, if you dare the hunt.

choices.label: Mount a great hunt
choices.note: The great hunt fed the tribe — at a cost.

choices.label: Follow and gather
choices.note: Followed the herd; the trackers learned its songs.

events.title: A sky omen
events.description: A burning light crosses the night sky. The tribe looks to you.

choices.label: Declare it a blessing
choices.note: A feast for the blessing — spirits soared.

choices.label: Read it as warning
choices.note: The tribe stockpiled against the warning.

events.title: Wildfire on the ridge
events.description: Flames race across the dry ridge toward your stores.

choices.label: Beat back the fire
choices.note: Fought the flames — the stores held.

choices.label: Grab what you can and flee
choices.note: Fled the smoke with what you could carry.

events.title: The river's gift
events.description: Spring floods leave the banks thick with fish and reeds.

choices.label: Feast tonight
choices.note: A feast — the tribe sang late into the night.

choices.label: Smoke and store
choices.note: Smoked the catch and cut new reeds.

events.title: A wandering storyteller
events.description: A stranger offers songs and tales gathered at distant fires.

choices.label: Host them warmly
choices.note: New tales enriched the tribe.

choices.label: Trade for their craft
choices.note: Learned a craft in exchange for goods.

civilisation.title: Stage 4 · Civilisation
civilisation.subtitle: Found settlements, trade, and advance your technology.

diplomacy.label: Establish an embassy
diplomacy.description: A permanent voice in their court, and theirs in yours.

diplomacy.label: Sign a trade treaty
diplomacy.description: Open the roads both ways (needs a non-hostile neighbour).

diplomacy.label: Sponsor dissent
diplomacy.description: Fund their malcontents. Cheaper than war, and never forgiven.

diplomacy.label: Garrison the frontier
diplomacy.description: Feed troops on the border to blunt their next incursion.

diplomacy.label: March on them
diplomacy.description: Commit your legions. Grind them down first — a repulsed march is costly.

actions.label: Terrace farming
actions.description: Surplus food frees hands for other work.

actions.label: Open markets
actions.description: Trade turns surplus into wealth.

actions.label: Send explorers
actions.description: Chart the lands beyond your borders.

actions.label: Raise granaries
actions.description: Stored surplus steadies the city through lean years.

actions.label: Invent writing
actions.description: Recorded knowledge compounds over generations.

actions.label: Found an academy
actions.description: Dedicated scholars accelerate discovery.

actions.label: Commission civic works
actions.description: Public works turn surplus into durable knowledge.

actions.label: Build aqueducts
actions.description: Water for the growing districts — the city swells.

actions.label: Expand the foundries
actions.description: Iron workshops accelerate discovery and trade.

actions.label: Found public institutions
actions.description: Classical institutions sustain learning across generations.

actions.label: Found a settlement
actions.description: Send settlers to raise a daughter town beyond the walls.

onboarding.title: From camp to city
onboarding.text: Your people now build to last. Placed decisions become real buildings — pick a spot and your city grows around it.

onboarding.title: Ages of invention
onboarding.text: As technology climbs, your civilisation crosses into new eras — watch the city transform around you.

onboarding.title: Roads and caravans
onboarding.text: Open trade with a rival and caravans will walk the road between your cities, carrying wealth home.

events.title: A creeping sickness
events.description: Fever spreads through the crowded settlements.

choices.label: Fund healers
choices.note: Healers studied the sickness — and learned.

choices.label: Quarantine
choices.note: Quarantine held, at a cost to trade.

events.title: A rival city rises
events.description: A neighbouring power eyes your trade routes.

choices.label: Forge an alliance
choices.note: An alliance opened new ideas.

choices.label: Fortify borders
choices.note: Borders held firm.

events.title: A foreign caravan
events.description: Traders from beyond the mountains offer strange goods.

choices.label: Buy their secrets
choices.note: Foreign ideas seeded new inventions.

choices.label: Tax their passage
choices.note: The toll filled the treasury.

events.title: A golden harvest
events.description: The terraces overflow. What to do with the surplus?

choices.label: Feast and festival
choices.note: The festival drew traders from afar.

choices.label: Store it all
choices.note: Granaries filled to the beams.

events.title: The great river floods
events.description: The delta bursts its banks, drowning fields and roads.

choices.label: Rebuild the levees
choices.note: New levees tamed the river.

choices.label: Move to higher ground
choices.note: Resettled the wards; salvage paid a little back.

events.title: A school of philosophers
events.description: Thinkers gather in the forum, arguing over the shape of the world.

choices.label: Fund the school
choices.note: The school bore new ideas.

choices.label: Let them fund themselves
choices.note: Patrons paid; a few ideas trickled out.

events.title: Unrest in the provinces
events.description: Outlying towns chafe under the capital's taxes.

choices.label: Lower the taxes
choices.note: Eased taxes bought back their loyalty.

choices.label: Send the garrison
choices.note: Order restored; the engineers learned siegecraft.

planetary.title: Stage 5 · Planetary
planetary.subtitle: Balance industry and ecology, and unify your world.

diplomacy.label: Convene a summit
diplomacy.description: Get every bloc in one room and keep them there.

diplomacy.label: Technology transfer
diplomacy.description: Share what you know. Goodwill compounds (needs a non-hostile bloc).

diplomacy.label: Impose sanctions
diplomacy.description: Close your markets to them. Effective, and long remembered.

diplomacy.label: Harden infrastructure
diplomacy.description: Shield your grid and ports against their next reprisal.

actions.label: Build industry
actions.description: Industry powers progress — but strains the world.

actions.label: Green technology
actions.description: Clean systems heal the biosphere over time.

actions.label: Rewilding programs
actions.description: Give whole regions back to the wild.

actions.label: Fund habitat restoration
actions.description: Restore damaged ecosystems and establish permanent recovery programmes.

actions.label: World councils
actions.description: Shared governance draws the planet together.

actions.label: Global accord
actions.description: A lasting accord unites your species as one.

actions.label: One voice
actions.description: A planetary anthem — every bloc at one table.

actions.label: Planetary assembly
actions.description: Seat every nation in one chamber at your capital.

actions.label: Global broadcast
actions.description: One signal, heard in every language on the planet.

actions.label: World archive
actions.description: Every history your species remembers, kept in one vault.

actions.label: Orbital spaceport
actions.description: Look up. The first rung of the ladder off this world.

onboarding.title: One world, many powers
onboarding.text: Your civilisation now spans the globe — alongside rival power blocs. Unity is the goal; the biosphere is the limit.

onboarding.title: The living world
onboarding.text: Watch the planet itself: as ecology falls the land greys and smogs. If it hits zero, unity stalls until the world heals.

onboarding.title: Power blocs
onboarding.text: Rival blocs impose sanctions instead of raids, and race you to lead the world. Diplomacy matters more than walls.

events.title: The climate turns
events.description: Rising strain on the biosphere threatens millions.

choices.label: Emergency rewilding
choices.note: Rewilding pulled the world back from the edge.

choices.label: Engineer around it
choices.note: Bold engineering rallied the world.

events.title: A region secedes
events.description: A powerful region threatens to break away.

choices.label: Offer autonomy
choices.note: Autonomy kept the peace.

choices.label: Hold the union
choices.note: The union held — for now.

events.title: The seas bloom
events.description: Restored oceans erupt with life — the first great bloom in a century.

choices.label: Protect it absolutely
choices.note: The bloom became a sanctuary.

choices.label: Harvest carefully
choices.note: A careful harvest fed the machines.

events.title: A general strike
events.description: Workers across three blocs down tools, demanding a cleaner world.

choices.label: Meet their demands
choices.note: The strikers' banner became the world's.

choices.label: Wait them out
choices.note: The strike faded, but the anger stayed.

events.title: A reactor falters
events.description: An aging fusion plant edges toward failure above a crowded bloc.

choices.label: Shut it down safely
choices.note: A safe shutdown; the grid dimmed for a season.

choices.label: Push it to the limit
choices.note: The plant held — barely — and kept the lights on.

events.title: Climate migrants
events.description: Millions flee the drowning coasts, seeking new homes inland.

choices.label: Open the borders
choices.note: Open doors knit the blocs closer together.

choices.label: Fund resettlement camps
choices.note: Orderly camps eased the strain on the land.

events.title: A world exposition
events.description: The blocs gather to show their wonders under one banner.

choices.label: Host a grand fair
choices.note: The fair became a symbol of one world.

choices.label: Showcase green tech
choices.note: Clean wonders inspired every delegation.

space.title: Stage 6 · Space
space.subtitle: Explore, colonise, and carry your lineage to the stars.

diplomacy.label: Open first contact
diplomacy.description: Send the greeting your species has rehearsed for centuries.

diplomacy.label: Sign a starlane pact
diplomacy.description: Shared lanes, shared charts (needs a non-hostile power).

diplomacy.label: Subvert their networks
diplomacy.description: Quietly corrupt their archives. They will trace it eventually.

diplomacy.label: Raise system shields
diplomacy.description: Ring your worlds against their next eclipse.

actions.label: Launch probes
actions.description: Probes chart the nearby systems — each launch lights another star.

actions.label: Take the helm
actions.description: Fly out yourself. Steer with WASD or the arrow keys; press Esc to return to the chart.

actions.label: Orbital shipyards
actions.description: Shipyards turn research into fleets and alloy.

actions.label: Found a colony
actions.description: Seed your lineage on a charted world (needs a revealed system).

actions.label: Interstellar ships
actions.description: Ships that cross the dark carry life to the stars.

actions.label: The great archive
actions.description: Everything your species has ever been, remembered forever.

actions.label: Send the last ship
actions.description: Everything your lineage was, carried outward one final time. This ends the story.

objective.label: Carry your lineage to the stars

onboarding.title: The last shore
onboarding.text: You begin in close orbit of your homeworld. Build shipyards, then launch your first probe to break orbit — the camera pulls back to reveal the starmap you'll explore.

onboarding.title: New worlds
onboarding.text: Each revealed system can hold a colony — every colony adds to your legacy, and ships will trace the lanes between them.

onboarding.title: Something older
onboarding.text: Something else moves among the stars. If it outpaces you, it will claim systems for itself. Chart fast.

events.title: A strange signal
events.description: Probes detect an anomaly in a nearby system.

choices.label: Investigate
choices.note: The anomaly yielded new science.

choices.label: Keep your distance
choices.note: Caution steadied the colonies.

events.title: An elder civilisation
events.description: You make contact with a far older species.

choices.label: Seek their knowledge
choices.note: Ancient knowledge changed your course.

choices.label: Trade as equals
choices.note: A fair trade enriched the lineage.

events.title: The first generation ship
events.description: Ten thousand volunteers ask to sail beyond every map.

choices.label: Bless the voyage
choices.note: The ship sailed beyond every map.

choices.label: Keep them home
choices.note: Their genius stayed — and built.

events.title: A stellar flare
events.description: Your home star convulses; orbitals brace for the wave.

choices.label: Shield the yards
choices.note: The yards rode out the flare.

choices.label: Study the storm
choices.note: The flare rewrote stellar science.

events.title: A derelict hulk
events.description: A dead ship drifts in a charted lane, its hull scarred by ages.

choices.label: Salvage the wreck
choices.note: Old alloy filled the yards.

choices.label: Study its logs
choices.note: Its logs rewrote your star charts.

events.title: A colony flourishes
events.description: One young colony reports a generation of plenty and new births.

choices.label: Invest in its growth
choices.note: The colony became a beacon among the stars.

choices.label: Tax its surplus
choices.note: Its surplus fuelled the fleet.

events.title: A distant gamma burst
events.description: A far-off star dies, washing your sensors in hard radiation.

choices.label: Harden the archives
choices.note: The archives rode out the wave intact.

choices.label: Turn sensors toward it
choices.note: The dying star yielded rare science.
